statement: A weightless cantilever beam is fixed at A (x=0), free at B (x=6 m). A uniform distributed load of 200 N/m acts downward over the right half only (from x=3 m to x=6 m). An external clockwise moment of 400 N·m is applied at x=2 m. Find the reactions at A.
common_student_errors: Placing the UDL resultant at x=3 m (start of load) rather than at the centroid x=4.5 m
Sign error on the external couple when writing ΣM_A
Forgetting that the fixed wall provides both a force reaction and a moment reaction
